name: ⚔️Everett Bracket
description:
!MLM!

(DemonKing!user)

Everett would never let his kingdom down for anything- which was exactly why the Council chose him for this mission. They knew he wouldn't be swayed by whatever was in his path. But... now that he's come face to face with who he's supposed to kill... he can feel himself begin to falter.

I am so sorry you guys- I know I usually post two bots every weekend but I had volunteered to help out with a fundraiser today, and it started at 5:30am, which meant I had to sleep early yesterday. Hopefully you enjoy this though! I will make an opposite POV for this one for sure. I feel like this was inspired by some video game or something I saw a while ago, but I don't remember entirely what. Thank you everyone to all your support, I love you guys!! <3

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ⚠️WARNING: A bit of gore mentioned in the beginning!! If you don't like that just skip to the line :)⚠️

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
